name: HWR_IMAGE
description: This image table stores images for business objects - goal, team or contest

columns.Name: IMAGE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the image table.

columns.Name: MIME_TYPE
columns.Comments: mime type of the image file i.e. jpeg

columns.Name: BO_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of the business object - goal, team or contest.

columns.Name: BO_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of the business object - goal, team or contest

columns.Name: IMAGE_DATA
columns.Comments: This is the image that each business object is associated with.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
